findings.description: Section s2 has an empty title string in the index. The source h2 heading is「リクエストに対応するメソッドの作成」. An empty title makes the section undiscoverable via index lookup.
findings.source_evidence: RST heading: 'リクエストに対応するメソッドの作成\n=================================='  (h2, equals-underline)

findings.description: Several PascalCase class names that appear prominently in the s2 Java code example are absent from s2 hints: ApplicationException (thrown in two places), ValidationUtil (used for validateAndConvertRequest), MessageUtil (used in TooManyResultException handler), MessageLevel (used in MessageUtil.createMessage), W11AC01SearchForm (used as type parameter and local variable).
findings.source_evidence: Source Java: 'throw new ApplicationException(...)', 'ValidationUtil.validateAndConvertRequest("11AC_W11AC01", W11AC01SearchForm.class, req, "search")', 'MessageUtil.createMessage(MessageLevel.ERROR, "MSG00035", e.getMaxResultCount())'
